items.description:
A skillful knight of light and honor.

Left variant: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/7112280817/Left-Paladin-Pauldron

These are sold separately so they support animations, which would not be possible if they were both combined to one accessory. Do you want to wear both pauldrons? Don't worry, your saviour is here! Use the "Advanced" button in the Avatar Editor to wear both of them.
